channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Zimbabwean boxer Ndodana Ncube passes away following stroke after match
item.description: Zimbabwean boxer Ndodana 'Black Hammer' Ncube has tragically passed away at the age of 29 in Middelburg, just as he was showing signs of recovery following a stroke. Ncube had been hospitalised in a c...

item.title: Presidency Clarifies True Timing of ISIS Commander Al-Manuki’s Death
item.description: The Nigerian Presidency don clarify the wahala wey surround reports say Abu-Bilal Al-Manuki, the senior commander of Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP), don die before now. Special Adviser to ...

item.title: Kiefer Sutherland cancels US tour amid low ticket demand
item.description: Actor and singer-songwriter Kiefer Sutherland has announced the cancellation of the US leg of his upcoming tour due to low ticket sales. The news was shared on his Instagram on 15 May, where Sutherlan...

item.title: Molly-Mae Hague attends Venezuela Fury's wedding with daughter Bambi as bridesmaid while partner Tommy Fury is absent
item.description: Molly-Mae Hague attended the wedding of Venezuela Fury, the 16-year-old daughter of boxer Tyson Fury, on the Isle of Man on Saturday. The Love Island star chose a casual outfit of black trousers and a...

item.title: Camille Seaman on Photographing Supercell Storms and Icebergs
item.description: In this in-depth interview, photographer Camille Seaman discusses her acclaimed series featured in the Prix Pictet 'Storm' cycle. Best known for her 'Last Iceberg' project capturing Arctic and Antarct...

item.title: Study Links Low Brain Choline Levels to Anxiety Disorders
item.description: Researchers at the University of California - Davis Health have identified a notable chemical difference in the brains of people with anxiety disorders. A comprehensive analysis of 25 prior studies in...

item.title: Montreal to Close Select Streets to Vehicles During Summer Months
item.description: Starting this summer, several streets in Montreal will be converted into pedestrian-only zones to encourage outdoor activities and safer, car-free environments. The initiative aims to provide resident...

item.title: Democrats warn GOP redistricting may disproportionately impact Black lawmakers in South Carolina
item.description: Following a Supreme Court ruling that weakened a key provision of the Voting Rights Act, Republican-led states have accelerated efforts to redraw congressional district maps, a move widely seen as pol...

item.title: 80-Year-Old Man Passes Away After Power Outage Prevents Nebulization
item.description: An 80-year-old man in Laguna tragically died after being unable to use his nebulizer due to a rotational brownout. The incident occurred while he was managing his asthma, which required daily nebuliza...

item.title: Dunkin' returns to Canada but faces challenges competing with Tim Hortons
item.description: The U.S. coffee and doughnut chain Dunkin' is planning a return to the Canadian market, starting with locations in Toronto and Montreal, through a partnership with Montreal-based restaurant operator F...

item.title: Rep. Don Beyer Challenges Eric Trump Claim About Family Investments With Financial Disclosure
item.description: Rep. Don Beyer (D-Va.) publicly challenged Eric Trump's claim that President Donald Trump's assets are held in a blind trust that does not involve individual stock transactions. Beyer shared a recentl...

item.title: Campers in Saskatchewan Embrace May Long Weekend Despite Rain and Snow
item.description: Despite forecasts predicting rain and even snow in parts of Saskatchewan, campers are heading outdoors for the May long weekend, showing determination to enjoy the seasonal tradition regardless of the...

item.title: Bulls Secure Home URC Quarter-Final with Convincing 45-19 Victory Over Benetton
item.description: In a United Rugby Championship encounter at Loftus Versfeld, the Bulls managed to secure the vital five log points needed to confirm their home quarter-final advantage, defeating Benetton 45-19. While...

item.title: Driver injures seven pedestrians on sidewalk in Modena, Italy; arrested with knife
item.description: In a shocking incident on Saturday in the northern Italian city of Modena, a driver in his 30s drove his car onto a busy sidewalk on Emilia Centro street, injuring seven people including four seriousl...

item.title: Illegal tire processing facility in Pampanga raided; two Chinese nationals detained
item.description: Authorities in San Fernando, Pampanga conducted a raid on the RP Oil Tire Pyrolysis facility located in an industrial park in Barangay San Pablo Libutad, San Simon, following complaints from local res...

item.title: Long Mejia gives viewers a tour of his spacious home on Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal
item.description: On the latest episode of Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal, Long Mejia excitedly showcased his large and well-designed home to viewers. Known for his charm and engaging personality, Long shared the features o...

item.title: US Industrial Gas Demand Rises Amid Iran War Disruptions in Global Energy
item.description: The United States is seeing a structural increase in industrial natural gas consumption, expected to remain at record levels through 2027. The US Energy Information Administration reports that 2025 co...

item.title: Ursula Andress in the 1970s: Her Transition to European Cinema and Enduring Icon Status
item.description: Ursula Andress, the Swiss actress and model born on March 19, 1936, became an international sex symbol after her iconic role as Honey Ryder in the 1962 James Bond film Dr. No. The 1970s marked a signi...

item.title: Boxer diversifies revenue streams through data analytics, media platforms and digital services
item.description: Boxer, the popular South African retailer, is expanding beyond its traditional grocery and liquor sales by developing new income streams from its large customer base. The company is investing in data ...

item.title: APC Oyo Holds Peaceful House of Reps Primaries as 74 Aspirants Contest for 2027 Tickets
item.description: Mojeed Alabi, di Chairman of di APC House of Representatives Primaries Election Committee for Oyo State, don declare say di primary exercise wey dem do across di 14 federal constituencies in di state ...
